parents.subject: LU-19131 utils: 'lfs mirror extend' should use DIO

commit.subject: LU-8066 obdclass: Use spinlock when accessing export nodemap
commit.message:
LU-8066 obdclass: Use spinlock when accessing export nodemap

Printing the assigned nodemap on the export through debugfs was not
protected through its spinlock. This patch adds the spinlock and
improves the output to include the client UUID. Otherwise, the nodemap
name may get printed multiple times without further information.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I888e7cbe819b9327660a3e85b7cd3d6c0d7cf1ac
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60804
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
